title: Binary Black Holes population synthesis based on the current LVK observations
summary: The ongoing observations from ground based gravitational-wave observatories have led to the detection of more than a hundred merger events between black holes. We use the LIGO-Virgo-KAGRA (LVK) observations from 2015 to early 2024, to test the population synthesis of these merging binaries; which will allow us to probe the formation mechanisms and environments of these black holes. We test if the current sample of binary black holes can be explained only by the merger of black holes coming from the collapse of the cores of massive stars, i.e. as just first generation black holes merging with each other. Those black holes' masses will roughly follow a power-law distribution. We also test if in addition to the merger between first generation black holes, there is evidence for a second population of black hole binaries in which at least one the binaries' members is the product of an earlier merger between black holes. These binaries are typically referred to as signals of hierarchical mergers. Such a population can possibly explain the observation of very massive black hole binaries by the LVK collaboration. We find that the LVK observations give a statistical preference in log-likelihood of up to $- 2 Δln\mathcal{L} = -150$ or in log-Bayes factor of up to $ln\textrm{BF} = 71$, for the full sample of black hole binaries originating from a combination of black holes following a power-law distribution and black holes from hierarchical mergers. The ratio of black holes following a power-law mass-distribution to a mass-distribution expected from hierarchical mergers is found to be as high as one-to-one. We also consider that some of the LVK black hole merging binaries are the result of primordial black holes (PBHs), merging inside dark matter halos and in the intergalactic medium. Adding a third population is preferred. [abridged]

AI.tldr: LVK引力波观测数据显示，黑洞合并事件中既包含第一代恒星坍缩形成的黑洞，也包含由早期黑洞合并形成的第二代黑洞，两者比例可达1:1，且可能存在第三类原初黑洞。
AI.motivation: 通过分析LVK观测到的黑洞合并事件，研究黑洞的形成机制和环境，检验这些合并是否仅来自第一代恒星坍缩形成的黑洞，还是包含由早期黑洞合并形成的第二代黑洞，以及是否存在原初黑洞。
AI.method: 使用2015年至2024年初的LIGO-Virgo-KAGRA观测数据，测试黑洞合并的群体合成模型。比较两种假设：1）仅第一代黑洞（质量服从幂律分布）合并；2）第一代黑洞与第二代黑洞（由早期黑洞合并形成）共同存在。同时考虑第三类原初黑洞的可能性。
AI.result: LVK观测数据显示，黑洞合并群体由幂律分布的黑洞和等级合并形成的黑洞共同组成，两者比例可达1:1。统计上显著支持这一混合模型（对数似然差-150，对数贝叶斯因子71）。添加第三类原初黑洞群体进一步改善模型拟合。
AI.conclusion: 黑洞合并事件不仅包含第一代恒星坍缩形成的黑洞，还包含由早期黑洞合并形成的第二代黑洞，两者比例相当。此外，可能存在第三类原初黑洞群体，这为理解黑洞形成机制提供了新视角。

title: Black Hole Properties of Type-1 Active Galactic Nuclei in the North Ecliptic Pole Wide Field: I. Mid-infrared Sources with Optical Counterparts
comment: 20 pages, 10 figures, Accepted for publication in ApJS
summary: We present measurements of black hole (BH) properties of 861 Type-1 active galactic nuclei (AGNs) in the North Ecliptic Pole (NEP)-Wide field. These AGNs are detected in both optical and mid-infrared (MIR) surveys and are identified as Type-1 AGNs in optical spectroscopic surveys. By performing spectral energy distribution (SED) and line fitting, we obtained their MIR continuum luminosities ($L_{\rm MIR}$) as well as full width at half maximum (FWHM) values for the \ion{C}{4}, \ion{Mg}{2}, H$β$, and H$α$ lines. Using these measurements, we derived bolometric luminosities ($10^{43.20}$--$10^{47.27}~{\rm erg~s^{-1}}$), BH masses ($10^{7.29}$--$10^{9.67}$\,$M_{\odot}$), and Eddington ratios ($10^{-2.74}$--$10^{-0.08}$) for $\sim$450 objects over a wide redshift range ($z=0.09$--$4.71$). The use of $L_{\rm MIR}$ and FWHM values effectively alleviates the effects of dust extinction, enabling reliable estimates of BH properties even for dust-obscured AGNs. Moreover, we find that 34\,\% of the Type-1 AGNs in the NEP-Wide field are dust-obscured, and that their bolometric luminosities can be significantly underestimated without proper dust extinction correction. Our relatively extinction-free BH property estimates can (i) be combined with multi-wavelength data in the NEP-Wide field to facilitate diverse studies of AGN environments, number densities, host galaxies, and related topics, and (ii) serve as fiducial estimates for SPHEREx and other upcoming infrared (IR) spectroscopic missions covering the NEP-Wide field.

AI.tldr: 对北黄极宽场中861个I型活动星系核的黑洞性质进行测量，使用中红外连续谱和发射线宽度来减轻尘埃消光影响，获得了黑洞质量、爱丁顿比等参数，发现34%的I型AGN受尘埃遮蔽。
AI.motivation: 传统方法测量活动星系核黑洞性质时受尘埃消光影响较大，特别是对于尘埃遮蔽的AGN。本研究旨在利用中红外连续谱和发射线宽度来减轻尘埃消光效应，获得更可靠的黑洞性质估计。
AI.method: 对北黄极宽场中861个I型AGN进行光谱能量分布拟合和谱线拟合，获得中红外连续谱光度(L_MIR)以及CIV、MgII、Hβ、Hα等发射线的半高全宽。利用这些测量值计算黑洞质量、爱丁顿比等参数。
AI.result: 获得了约450个红移范围z=0.09-4.71的AGN的黑洞性质：光度范围10^43.20-10^47.27 erg/s，黑洞质量10^7.29-10^9.67 M⊙，爱丁顿比10^-2.74-10^-0.08。发现34%的I型AGN受尘埃遮蔽，且未经尘埃消光校正会显著低估其光度。
AI.conclusion: 使用中红外连续谱和发射线宽度可以有效减轻尘埃消光影响，为尘埃遮蔽AGN提供可靠的黑洞性质估计。这些数据可与多波段观测结合用于AGN环境、数密度、宿主星系等研究，并为SPHEREx等未来红外光谱任务提供基准数据。

title: Dark Matter Recoupling
summary: In the late Universe, and on cosmological scales, dark matter is conventionally assumed to be collisionless, as a consequence of the strong existing bounds on dark matter interactions at the Cosmic Microwave Background last-scattering surface. Challenging this lore, here we show that dark matter interactions can be naturally weak at early times, but then grow to observationally relevant strengths at very late times, even significantly after reionization. This is realized if dark matter recouples to a dark radiation species in the range of redshifts probed by the current generation of galaxy surveys. We systematically study, for the first time, the phenomenology of this dark matter recoupling scenario. A combination of Cosmic Microwave Background and Baryon Acoustic Oscillation data show that the interaction needs to be weak at present, if the entirety of dark matter couples to dark radiation. From a complementary perspective, a 4% fraction of dark matter could still be strongly interacting today. Implications for a microscopic model realizing the recoupling dynamics are discussed.

AI.tldr: 暗物质在早期宇宙中基本无碰撞，但在晚期宇宙中通过与暗辐射的再耦合变得相互作用显著，这一现象挑战了传统暗物质无碰撞的假设。
AI.motivation: 传统上认为暗物质在宇宙学尺度上是无碰撞的，因为宇宙微波背景辐射的观测给出了暗物质相互作用的强约束。但本文挑战这一传统观点，探索暗物质相互作用在晚期宇宙中变得显著的可能性。
AI.method: 提出暗物质再耦合模型：暗物质早期相互作用很弱，但在晚期（甚至再电离之后）通过与暗辐射的再耦合，相互作用强度增长到观测相关的水平。首次系统研究这种暗物质再耦合现象学。
AI.result: 结合宇宙微波背景和重子声学振荡数据分析表明：如果全部暗物质都与暗辐射耦合，那么目前的相互作用需要很弱；从互补角度看，大约4%的暗物质成分今天仍可能保持强相互作用。
AI.conclusion: 暗物质再耦合是可行的物理机制，挑战了暗物质始终无碰撞的传统假设。讨论了实现再耦合动力学的微观模型含义，为暗物质相互作用研究提供了新视角。

title: Obscured Star Formation in the Dwarf Galaxy DDO 43? A Comparative UV-IR Analysis
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, published in Astronomische Nachrichten
summary: We present a study of recent star formation in the dwarf irregular galaxy DDO 43 using GALEX FUV and WISE NIR imaging. We identify regions of elevated FUV flux, indicating unobscured star-forming activity across much of the galaxy. To further characterize the stellar content, we compare the FUV fluxes to archival WISE W1 and W2 infrared data across 56 regions of interest. A general correlation is found between the FUV and infrared fluxes, suggesting spatially coherent star formation throughout the galaxy. A few regions, however, show elevated infrared fluxes but little or no UV emission, potentially indicating localized, dust-obscured star formation.

AI.tldr: 利用GALEX FUV和WISE NIR成像研究矮不规则星系DDO 43的近期恒星形成活动，发现大部分区域存在未遮蔽的恒星形成，FUV与红外通量存在相关性，少数区域显示尘埃遮蔽的恒星形成。
AI.motivation: 研究矮不规则星系DDO 43的近期恒星形成活动，通过多波段观测了解其恒星形成特征和空间分布。
AI.method: 使用GALEX的远紫外（FUV）和WISE的近红外（NIR）成像数据，识别FUV通量升高的区域，并在56个感兴趣区域比较FUV通量与WISE W1、W2红外数据。
AI.result: 1. 在星系大部分区域发现未遮蔽的恒星形成活动；2. FUV与红外通量存在普遍相关性，表明空间上协调的恒星形成；3. 少数区域显示红外通量升高但UV辐射很少或没有，可能表明局部尘埃遮蔽的恒星形成。
AI.conclusion: DDO 43中存在广泛但空间协调的恒星形成活动，同时存在局部尘埃遮蔽的恒星形成区域，表明该矮不规则星系的恒星形成具有复杂性和多样性。

title: A Modified Conveyor Belt Model: Implications for Surface Density Thresholds for Massive Star Formation
comment: 17 pages, 17 figures, accepted for publication in the Monthly Notices of the Royal Astronomical Society
summary: Recent models and simulations of cluster formation within molecular clumps consider multi-scale, hierarchical accretion, which leads to clump mass growth over time. This mode of mass accumulation could have implications regarding the evolution of observable properties such as mass and radius, bringing into question the interpretation of commonly cited thresholds for high-mass star formation. In this paper, we use the conveyor belt model of cluster formation to create synthetic cores/clumps and derive physical and observational properties. We show that while this model successfully predicts many observed trends, modifications are required to match properties of high-mass prestellar clumps. When the model clumps are observationally classified as intermediate- or high-mass star-forming, the threshold delineating these two groups agrees with those found in the literature; however, results show that high-mass clumps at early evolutionary stages can be misclassified using standard surface density thresholds. Our logistic regression analysis reveals the quantity of material to ever enter a star-forming region is the most important factor in differentiating intermediate- and high-mass star-forming regions. This implies observations characterising the environment surrounding star-forming regions are crucial, especially at early evolutionary stages.

AI.tldr: 该研究使用传送带模型模拟星团形成，发现传统的高质量恒星形成阈值在早期演化阶段可能导致误分类，揭示进入恒星形成区的总物质量是区分中高质量区域的关键因素。
AI.motivation: 分子云团内星团形成的多尺度、分层吸积模型可能导致云团质量随时间增长，这可能影响可观测特性（如质量和半径）的演化，进而质疑传统高质量恒星形成阈值的解释。
AI.method: 使用星团形成的传送带模型创建合成核心/云团，推导物理和观测特性，并通过逻辑回归分析识别区分中高质量恒星形成区的关键因素。
AI.result: 模型成功预测了许多观测趋势，但需要修改以匹配高质量前恒星云团特性。早期演化阶段的高质量云团可能被标准表面密度阈值误分类。逻辑回归显示进入恒星形成区的总物质量是区分中高质量区域的最重要因素。
AI.conclusion: 观测表征恒星形成区周围环境至关重要，特别是在早期演化阶段，因为进入该区域的总物质量是决定其最终质量等级的关键因素，而非仅依赖表面密度阈值。

title: Going Wide and Deep with Roman: The z~6-9 UV luminosity function in a Roman Deep Field
comment: 31 pages, 12 figures, including 3 figure sets that are included in the appendix for the arxiv version. Submitted to ApJ
summary: We present a trade study of possible ultra-deep surveys with the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope, optimizing the depth-area-filter parameter space for high-redshift galaxy science. Using a mock galaxy catalog derived from a 2 sq. degree lightcone created using the Santa Cruz semi-analytic model and populated with over 7.6 million galaxies at 0<z<10 with M_UV < -15, with realistic clustering and synthetic photometry, we evaluate sixteen 500-hour survey configurations spanning 0.28-2 sq. degrees and four filter combinations. We demonstrate that even a single Roman pointing dramatically reduces cosmic variance compared to HST-like observations, more faithfully recovering the true UV luminosity function. For each survey configuration, we explore photometric redshift recovery, sample contamination, and measurements of the rest-UV luminosity function and non-ionizing UV luminosity density across four redshift bins at z~6-9. We find that inclusion of the R062 filter is essential for studies at z~5-6, reducing sample contamination from nearly 100% to negligible levels and recovering the bright end of the luminosity function. The F184 filter improves galaxy recovery at z>9 and is critical for stellar contamination removal at all redshifts. Based on these results, we recommend that a Roman ultra-deep survey cover at least two Roman pointings (0.56 sq. degrees) with all six filters (R062, Z087, Y106, J129, H158, F184), reducing uncertainties on the rest-UV luminosity density by factors of 2-4 relative to the deepest existing JWST programs. Building off of the Deep Tier of the High Latitude Time Domain Survey to add depth and filter coverage to existing (or planned) observations is an excellent option.

AI.tldr: 本文通过模拟研究优化了Nancy Grace Roman太空望远镜的超深巡天参数配置，发现包含R062和F184滤光片对高红移星系研究至关重要，建议至少覆盖0.56平方度并使用全部六个滤光片。
AI.motivation: 优化Nancy Grace Roman太空望远镜的超深巡天参数配置，为高红移星系科学研究找到最佳的深度-面积-滤光片组合，减少宇宙方差并提高观测效率。
AI.method: 使用Santa Cruz半解析模型创建的2平方度光锥模拟星系目录，包含760万个星系（0<z<10，M_UV<-15），评估16种500小时巡天配置（0.28-2平方度，四种滤光片组合），分析光度红移恢复、样本污染、UV光度函数和UV光度密度测量。
AI.result: 1. 单个Roman视场显著减少宇宙方差，更准确地恢复真实UV光度函数；2. R062滤光片对z~5-6研究至关重要，将样本污染从近100%降至可忽略水平；3. F184滤光片改善z>9星系恢复，对所有红移的恒星污染去除至关重要；4. 建议至少覆盖0.56平方度并使用全部六个滤光片，可将UV光度密度不确定性降低2-4倍。
AI.conclusion: 建议Roman超深巡天至少覆盖两个视场（0.56平方度）并使用全部六个滤光片（R062, Z087, Y106, J129, H158, F184），基于高纬度时域巡天深层的现有观测进行扩展是优秀选择。

title: Statistical consistency of sign-switching vacuum energy with cosmological observations
summary: We assess dataset agreement and late-time predictive adequacy in $Λ$CDM and its sign-switching extension, $Λ_{\rm s}$CDM, using a suite of Gaussian and exact non-Gaussian consistency diagnostics. Both models are constrained with cosmic microwave background measurements from Planck, ACT, and SPT, baryon acoustic oscillation data from DESI DR2, and low-redshift Type Ia supernova data from PantheonPlus+SH0ES. We find that commonly used Gaussian tension metrics can significantly overstate inconsistencies when broad, non-Gaussian posteriors are combined with tightly constrained datasets. In contrast, the exact non-Gaussian parameter shift indicates excellent consistency between CMB and BAO observations in both models. The $Λ_{\rm s}$CDM extension modestly improves geometric compatibility at intermediate redshifts, although reductions in parameter-level tension do not necessarily imply improved predictive consistency. These results highlight the importance of exact, non-Gaussian, and predictive diagnostics for robust assessments of cosmological model consistency.

AI.tldr: 研究评估了ΛCDM及其扩展模型ΛsCDM的数据集一致性和晚期预测能力，发现传统高斯张力指标在非高斯后验与精确数据集结合时会高估不一致性，而精确非高斯参数偏移显示CMB与BAO观测在两种模型中高度一致。
AI.motivation: 当前宇宙学模型评估中常用的高斯张力指标可能无法准确反映数据集间的一致性，特别是在处理非高斯后验分布时。需要开发更精确的非高斯一致性诊断方法来评估宇宙学模型的稳健性。
AI.method: 使用高斯和精确非高斯一致性诊断套件，结合Planck、ACT、SPT的宇宙微波背景测量，DESI DR2的重子声学振荡数据，以及PantheonPlus+SH0ES的低红移Ia型超新星数据，对ΛCDM和ΛsCDM模型进行约束分析。
AI.result: 1. 常用高斯张力指标在非高斯后验与精确数据集结合时会显著高估不一致性；2. 精确非高斯参数偏移显示CMB与BAO观测在两种模型中高度一致；3. ΛsCDM扩展模型在中等红移处适度改善了几何兼容性；4. 参数层面张力的减少不一定意味着预测一致性的改善。
AI.conclusion: 研究强调了精确、非高斯和预测性诊断对于稳健评估宇宙学模型一致性的重要性，传统高斯方法可能产生误导性结果，需要更全面的诊断框架。

title: HI Observations of Giant Low Surface Brightness Galaxies
summary: Giant low surface brightness galaxies (gLSBs) are galaxies with extremely extended, faint, optical disks over 50 kpc in radius and have high total masses which can reach 10^12 solar masses. The existence of such galaxies is problematic for current models of galaxy formation, since the major mergers responsible for the large total mass would likely have destroyed the extended optical disk. Examining the gas content of these galaxies is an important step in determining their formation mechanism, whether it be through slow gas accretion or the large disk (re)forming after a major merger. We present neutral atomic hydrogen (HI) observations of 19 gLSBs identified with the Hyper Suprime-Cam Subaru Strategic Program survey. Although most have high HI masses, they are generally lower than expected based on their large optical sizes, and we do identify some gLSBs with unusually low gas content. The HI spectra of these galaxies show evidence for a rotational disk, though these disks are more asymmetric than other galaxies with comparable mass. Four galaxies with similar surface brightness profiles to the gLSBs have also been selected from the Numerical Investigation of a Hundred Astrophysical Objects (NIHAO) simulation for comparison. There is evidence for significant galaxy mergers in the past for three of these NIHAO galaxies and these three galaxies show similar asymmetry in their HI spectra. Together, these results could indicate the large optical disk of gLSBs are the result of a recent merger.

AI.tldr: 巨型低表面亮度星系(gLSBs)具有超大光学盘面，其形成机制与当前星系形成模型存在矛盾。通过观测19个gLSBs的HI气体含量，发现它们虽然HI质量较高，但相对于光学尺寸仍偏低，且HI谱线不对称性较强。模拟对比表明，gLSBs的大光学盘可能是近期合并的结果。
AI.motivation: gLSBs的存在对当前星系形成模型构成挑战，因为产生大质量的主要合并通常会破坏其扩展的光学盘。研究这些星系的HI气体含量有助于揭示其形成机制——是通过缓慢气体吸积形成，还是在主要合并后重新形成大光学盘。
AI.method: 1. 使用Hyper Suprime-Cam Subaru Strategic Program巡天数据识别19个gLSBs；2. 对这些星系进行中性氢原子(HI)观测；3. 从NIHAO模拟中选取4个具有类似表面亮度分布的星系进行对比分析。
AI.result: 1. 大多数gLSBs具有较高的HI质量，但相对于其大光学尺寸仍偏低；2. 发现一些gLSBs具有异常低的气体含量；3. HI谱线显示旋转盘特征，但不对称性比同等质量的其他星系更强；4. NIHAO模拟中3个星系显示过去有显著合并事件，其HI谱线也表现出类似的不对称性。
AI.conclusion: gLSBs的大光学盘很可能是近期星系合并的结果。观测到的HI不对称性与模拟中经历合并的星系特征一致，支持了gLSBs通过合并形成的机制，而非缓慢气体吸积。

title: Constraints on Neutrino Mass with Void Weak Lensing Effect
summary: Cosmic voids, the underdense regions of the Large Scale Structure (LSS), provide cosmological information highly complementary to that obtained from overdense regions. In this work, we investigate the constraining power of the void-shear cross-correlation (void lensing effect) on the total neutrino mass. Based on cosmological simulations with varying neutrino masses, we identify voids with the DIVE void finder and obtain their density profiles from the underlying dark matter and neutrino distributions. We then generate mock shear catalogues through ray-tracing and measure the corresponding void lensing signals. Our results show that void lensing yields an independent constraint on total neutrino mass as $σ(M_ν)=0.096\,{\rm eV}$ in the absence of shape noise, and $σ(M_ν)=0.340\,{\rm eV}$ when adopting a Stage-III-like shape noise ($σ_e \simeq 0.3$). Moreover, we find a clear linear relationship between the void lensing signal and neutrino mass. We further validate the forward modelling of the void lensing signal from the void density profiles across different cosmologies, demonstrating its accuracy and potential for future applications. These findings highlight void lensing as a promising probe of massive neutrinos and motivate its applications to galaxy survey data as well as the combination with other cosmological observables.

AI.tldr: 利用宇宙空洞-剪切交叉相关（空洞透镜效应）约束中微子总质量，通过数值模拟发现空洞透镜可独立约束中微子质量，无形状噪声时精度达0.096eV，Stage-III类形状噪声下为0.340eV。
AI.motivation: 宇宙空洞作为大尺度结构中的低密度区域，提供与高密度区域互补的宇宙学信息。研究中微子质量对宇宙学模型至关重要，但传统观测方法存在局限性。空洞透镜效应作为新的探测手段，有望提供独立的中微子质量约束。
AI.method: 基于不同中微子质量的宇宙学数值模拟，使用DIVE空洞查找器识别空洞，从暗物质和中微子分布获取密度轮廓。通过光线追踪生成模拟剪切星表，测量相应的空洞透镜信号。验证不同宇宙学模型下空洞密度轮廓到透镜信号的前向建模准确性。
AI.result: 空洞透镜可独立约束中微子总质量：无形状噪声时精度σ(M_ν)=0.096eV，采用Stage-III类形状噪声（σ_e≈0.3）时精度为0.340eV。发现空洞透镜信号与中微子质量存在清晰的线性关系。成功验证了不同宇宙学下空洞密度轮廓到透镜信号前向建模的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 空洞透镜是探测大质量中微子的有前景的新方法，其与中微子质量存在线性关系且建模准确。该方法可应用于星系巡天数据，并与其他宇宙学观测相结合，为精确测量中微子质量提供新途径。

title: Detecting Axion-like particles using Cosmic Variance Cancellation with CMB and Radio surveys
comment: 39 pages, 12 figures, 5 tables. To be submitted to JCAP
summary: Axions and axion-like particles (ALPs) arise naturally in many extensions of the Standard Model and are among the well-motivated candidates for dark matter. In the presence of magnetic fields of galaxy clusters, Cosmic Microwave Background (CMB) photons can convert to ALPs, with the efficiency of the process governed by the cluster electron density and magnetic field profiles, the photon--ALP coupling strength ($g_{aγ}$), as well as the frequency ($ν$) of the photon at the redshift of the cluster. The CMB blackbody spectrum suggests that this resonant conversion also takes place at radio wavelengths, following the spectral behaviour of the ALP distortion signal. This opens a new window to search for ALPs using cosmic variance cancellation (CVC), with multi-frequency tracers of the same phenomenon in CMB photon--ALP resonant conversion. The constraints on the ALP signal ratios from different combinations of microwave and radio bands of the Simons Observatory (SO) and the Square Kilometre Array (SKA) can be significantly improved using CVC compared to the case of using auto-only spectra from the two experiments. With the large number of galaxy clusters that will be observed by SO and SKA, we will be able to obtain much more information using CVC, especially for low-mass ALPs with stronger signals. Using the auto-only spectra from galaxy clusters up to redshift $z = 1$ for inference of the normalized ratio parameter, we obtain a standard deviation of $5.9 \times 10^{-2}$ for an ALP mass $m_a = 10^{-14} \, \mathrm{eV}$, which improves to $1 \times 10^{-2}$ using CVC. This method provides a universal probe of the ALP distortion signal using its spectral dependence and can also invalidate false detections of the ALP signal based on its frequency behaviour in different bands.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出利用宇宙微波背景光子与轴子/轴子样粒子在星系团磁场中的共振转换现象，结合微波和射电波段的多频率观测，通过宇宙方差消除技术来探测轴子暗物质候选体。
AI.motivation: 轴子和轴子样粒子是标准模型扩展中自然出现的暗物质候选体。在星系团磁场中，宇宙微波背景光子可以转换为轴子，这一过程为探测轴子提供了新的机会。传统的单波段观测方法存在局限性，需要更有效的方法来探测轴子信号。
AI.method: 利用宇宙方差消除技术，结合西蒙斯天文台的微波波段和平方公里阵列的射电波段观测数据。通过分析星系团中光子-轴子共振转换产生的多频率信号，利用不同波段信号比率的谱依赖性来探测轴子。
AI.result: 对于质量为10^{-14} eV的轴子，仅使用自相关谱时归一化比率参数的标准偏差为5.9×10^{-2}，而使用宇宙方差消除技术后改进到1×10^{-2}。该方法显著提高了探测灵敏度，特别是对低质量轴子信号更强的情况。
AI.conclusion: 宇宙方差消除技术结合多波段观测为探测轴子暗物质提供了强大的新方法，能够显著提高探测灵敏度，并可通过信号的频率行为验证或排除虚假探测。该方法为利用轴子畸变信号的谱依赖性提供了通用探测手段。

authors: the LSST Dark Energy Science Collaboration
title: Probing Physics Beyond the Standard Model through Combined Analyses of Next-Generation Type Ia Supernova, CMB, and BAO Surveys
comment: 23 pages, 13 figures; Comments welcome; The likelihood code, associated data products, and plotting scripts can be downloaded from https://github.com/sriniraghunathan/CMB_BAO_SNe_likelihoods
summary: Observations of Type Ia supernovae (SNIa), baryon acoustic oscillations (BAO), and the cosmic microwave background (CMB), which probe the late-, intermediate-, and early-universe epochs, respectively, provide complementary constraints on the expansion history of the Universe. In this work, we forecast constraints on dark energy and other extensions to the standard cosmological model by combining the SNIa sample expected from the Vera C. Rubin Observatory's Legacy Survey of Space and Time (LSST), data from current and forthcoming CMB surveys, and BAO measurements from the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument (DESI). For the CMB, we use temperature, polarization, and lensing power spectra ($TT/EE/TE/φφ$) from South Pole Telescope, the planned Advanced Simons Observatory, and a CMB-S4-like experiment. We derive constraints on $Λ{\rm CDM}$ and its extensions involving the dark energy equation of state parameters $(w_{0}, w_{a})$ and the sum of neutrino masses $\sum m_ν$, using a Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) sampling framework. We find that the LSST Year-3 SNIa sample can improve upon the DES Year-5 dark energy constraints by a factor of $\times2-\times2.5$, with the gains driven primarily by the significantly higher SNIa density in the LSST sample. Similarly, DESI-DR3 shows up to a $\times1.8$ improvement on dark energy parameters over DR2, driven largely by the substantial increase in low-redshift sample. Combining CMB with LSST-Y3-SNIa and DESI-DR3-BAO yields $σ(w_{0}) = 0.028$ and $σ(w_{a}) = 0.11$ for $w_{0} w_{a} {\rm CDM}$ cosmology with the results being largely independent of the CMB dataset. The constraints weaken by 10%-30% when freeing $\sum m_ν$ and spatial curvature. Moreover, the joint analysis of the three datasets can enable a $2-3σ$ detection of $\sum m_ν$.

AI.tldr: LSST超新星、DESI重子声学振荡和CMB数据联合分析，将显著改善暗能量和宇宙学参数的约束，特别是暗能量状态方程参数和宇宙学常数模型。
AI.motivation: 通过结合不同宇宙时期（早期、中期、晚期）的观测数据——CMB、BAO和超新星，提供互补的宇宙膨胀历史约束，以更精确地限制暗能量和其他标准宇宙学模型的扩展。
AI.method: 使用马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛采样框架，结合LSST第三年超新星样本、DESI-DR3重子声学振荡数据，以及SPT、ASO和CMB-S4-like实验的CMB温度、偏振和透镜功率谱，对ΛCDM及其扩展模型进行约束分析。
AI.result: LSST超新星样本相比DES第五年数据可将暗能量约束提高2-2.5倍；DESI-DR3相比DR2可提高1.8倍；联合分析可获得σ(w₀)=0.028和σ(wₐ)=0.11的精确约束；释放中微子质量和空间曲率参数会使约束减弱10%-30%；三数据集联合分析可实现2-3σ水平的中微子质量探测。
AI.conclusion: 多信使宇宙学观测数据的联合分析能够显著提升对暗能量、中微子质量和宇宙学参数的约束能力，为理解宇宙加速膨胀和基本物理提供更精确的观测基础。

title: Epicyclic Density Variations in the Indus Stellar Stream
comment: 18 pages, 16 figures, 3 supplementary movies, accepted by MNRAS
summary: Longitudinal density fluctuations observed in stellar streams can result from gravitational interactions with massive perturbers in the Milky Way, such as dark matter subhalos. Analysing these density variations provides a powerful probe of properties (motion, mass, size, etc.) of the perturbing objects. However, caution is needed because density variations may arise naturally from internal dynamics of streams, namely epicycles. In this work, we focus on the Indus stellar stream, a remnant of an ancient dwarf satellite of the Galaxy. An Indus stream spanning $\sim 90^\circ$ is revealed in the southern Galactic sky using a comprehensive matched-filter analysis utilizing data from the Gaia mission. A spatial density model is fitted to the filtered map to quantitatively characterize the morphology, which demonstrates episodic density peaks and gaps in the stream. Through N-body simulations, we show that there are strong epicyclic motions of stars happening during tidal disruptions. The present-day longitudinal densities from simulations are comparable to the measurement from data, with similar numbers and locations of peaks and gaps, suggesting that the observed density should mainly be caused by epicycles. We also find that a cuspy dark matter halo for the Indus dwarf is likely to produce milder stellar epicyclic peaks compared to a cored halo which results in steeper peaks. This arises from different instantaneous mass loss due to distinct central mass distributions of halos, where a cored halo usually leads to severer tidal stripping. The observed density exhibits moderate peak sharpness, implying that Indus may have originally possessed a cuspy halo.

AI.tldr: 研究通过分析Indus星流密度波动，发现观测到的密度峰值和间隙主要源于星流内部动力学（本轮运动），而非暗物质子晕扰动，并指出Indus矮星系可能具有尖峰暗物质晕。
AI.motivation: 恒星流中的纵向密度波动可能源于暗物质子晕等大质量扰动体的引力相互作用，但也可能来自星流内部动力学（本轮运动）。需要区分这两种机制，以准确探测银河系中暗物质子晕的性质。
AI.method: 1. 利用Gaia任务数据进行综合匹配滤波分析，揭示南天银河中约90°的Indus恒星流；2. 拟合空间密度模型定量表征形态，识别密度峰值和间隙；3. 通过N体模拟研究潮汐瓦解过程中的本轮运动；4. 比较模拟与观测的密度分布，分析尖峰与核心暗物质晕的不同效应。
AI.result: 1. Indus星流显示出间歇性密度峰值和间隙；2. N体模拟显示潮汐瓦解期间存在强烈的本轮运动；3. 模拟的当前纵向密度分布与观测数据具有可比性，峰值和间隙的数量和位置相似，表明观测密度主要源于本轮运动；4. 尖峰暗物质晕产生的恒星本轮峰值较温和，而核心晕产生更陡峭的峰值；5. 观测密度显示中等峰值锐度，暗示Indus可能原本具有尖峰暗物质晕。
AI.conclusion: Indus星流观测到的密度波动主要源于内部动力学（本轮运动）而非外部暗物质子晕扰动。通过比较尖峰与核心暗物质晕的模拟结果，发现观测到的中等峰值锐度支持Indus矮星系原本具有尖峰暗物质晕的假设。这为区分密度波动的不同起源提供了重要方法。

title: Recovering the infall mass for Milky Way satellite galaxy Sextans
comment: 16 pages, 9 figures, accepted for publication in MNRAS
summary: Understanding the formation and evolution of the Milky Way (MW) requires detailed knowledge of its satellite galaxies. In this study, we focus on the Sextans dwarf spheroidal (dSph) galaxy, a faint, dark matter (DM)-dominated satellite, to investigate the role of tidal and baryonic effects in shaping its observed properties. Using tailored $N$-body simulations, we explore possible orbits of Sextans in different MW models to reconstruct its progenitor's properties. Our simulations demonstrate the stars in Sextans are only mildly affected by galactic tides and the stellar kinematics provide robust constraints on its dynamical mass within the half-light radius, while the tidal mass loss of its DM component depends primarily on MW mass. The recovered infall mass of Sextans ranges from $1.22$ to $3.14\times10^9\rm\,M_\odot$ for MW masses from $0.8$ to $2\times10^{12}\rm\,M_\odot$. If the DM density remained as cuspy as NFW profile, the infall mass would be smaller by a factor of 2. Although with large ranges, the possible infall masses of Sextans recovered by our simulations are consistent with the stellar mass-halo mass relation in TNG50 and abundance matching results. We find some cases for the cuspy DM density profile where the infall mass is smaller than $10^9\rm\,M_\odot$, possibly indicating that star formation in Sextans is more efficient than in other satellites. The recovered DM halo structural parameters from our simulations provide valuable constraints for future studies on the DM content and formation history of Sextans.

AI.tldr: 通过N体模拟研究Sextans矮球状星系的形成历史，发现其恒星受潮汐影响较小，但暗物质损失取决于银河系质量，推算其初始质量在1.22-3.14×10^9 M⊙之间。
AI.motivation: 理解银河系卫星星系Sextans矮球状星系的形成和演化，探究潮汐和重子效应对其观测特性的影响，为研究银河系形成历史提供关键信息。
AI.method: 使用定制的N体模拟，在不同银河系质量模型下探索Sextans的可能轨道，重建其前身星系特性，分析恒星动力学和暗物质损失。
AI.result: 模拟显示Sextans恒星仅受轻微潮汐影响，其动力学质量在半光半径内稳定；暗物质损失主要取决于银河系质量，推算初始质量在1.22-3.14×10^9 M⊙之间，与TNG50和丰度匹配结果一致。
AI.conclusion: Sextans的暗物质晕结构参数为未来研究其暗物质含量和形成历史提供了重要约束，某些尖峰暗物质密度分布情况表明其恒星形成效率可能高于其他卫星星系。

title: The role of mass loss in constraining quenching time in dwarf galaxies from AGB and RGB star counts
comment: Accepted for publication on Astronomy & Astrophysics. 16 pages, 12 figures
summary:
The capability of reconstructing the past star formation history of dwarf elliptical galaxies
  out of the Local Volume relies on modelling bright stellar populations currently
  evolving through the red giant branch (RGB) and the asymptotic giant branch (AGB) phases.
  Recent studies proposed the use of the relative fractions of RGB and AGB stars populating
  specific boxes in the observational colour-magnitude plane to infer the epoch within
  which 90\% of the stellar population of the galaxy formed (T90).
  We aim at understanding the physical process of stellar evolution that are constrained by
  the relationship between the relative fraction of AGB and RGB stars of dwarf galaxies and
  the T90 epoch.
  We use updated stellar models that include the description of dust formation in the
  wind, to undertake a population synthesis approach, to allow monitoring the variation of the
  NAGB/NRGB ratio with time. The effects of some specific ingredients, such as
  the mass loss experienced by low-mass stars during the RGB phase, and the details of the
  time variation of the star formation rate, are extensively explored and tested against
  data.
  The mass lost by low-mass stars during the RGB evolution proves the most
  relevant ingredients affecting the time variation of NAGB/NRGB: at
  metallicities ~ 1/10 solar, a mass loss ~ 0.25Msun is required to reproduce the observations. This
  analysis allows to derive a relationship between NAGB/NRGB and T90, with a ~ 1 Gyr uncertainty on T90.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过分析矮椭圆星系中AGB与RGB恒星的相对比例，建立了与星系90%恒星形成时间(T90)的关系，发现低质量恒星在RGB阶段的物质损失是影响这一比例的关键因素。
AI.motivation: 为了理解矮椭圆星系中渐近巨星分支(AGB)与红巨星分支(RGB)恒星相对比例与星系90%恒星形成时间(T90)之间的物理关系，从而更准确地重建星系恒星形成历史。
AI.method: 使用包含星风尘埃形成描述的更新恒星模型，采用星族合成方法，监测NAGB/NRGB比例随时间的变化。重点研究了低质量恒星在RGB阶段的物质损失以及恒星形成率时间变化细节的影响。
AI.result: 发现低质量恒星在RGB演化阶段的物质损失是影响NAGB/NRGB时间变化的最关键因素。在约1/10太阳金属丰度下，需要约0.25太阳质量的物质损失才能重现观测数据。建立了NAGB/NRGB与T90的关系，T90的不确定性约为10亿年。
AI.conclusion: 通过分析AGB与RGB恒星相对比例，可以推断矮椭圆星系的恒星形成历史，其中RGB阶段的物质损失是决定这一比例的关键物理过程，为重建局部体积内矮椭圆星系的恒星形成历史提供了可靠方法。

title: Hidden Vela Supercluster Revealed by First Hybrid Redshift & Peculiar Velocity Reconstruction
summary:
A large fraction of the extragalactic sky is obscured by foreground dust and stars along the plane of the Milky Way, leaving a major gap (~ 20%) in whole-sky maps of large-scale structures -- an incompleteness that is even more severe for peculiar velocity samples. This has long limited an unambiguous interpretation of observed cosmic flows and their connection to the underlying mass-density field.
  We present a new hybrid reconstruction methodology which combines 65,518 galaxy peculiar velocity distances from the CF4++ catalogue (Courtois2025) with 8283 new galaxy redshifts observed near the southern Galactic plane (|b| <= 10 degrees) Zone of Avoidance. A major advance is the inclusion of 2176 high-sensitivity, interferometric HI redshifts obtained with the SARAO MeerKAT telescope which for the first time provide coverage of the innermost 3degrees-wide strip of the southern ZOA and to unprecedented depth.
  This hybrid redshifts & peculiar velocities approach yields a substantially revised view of the inferred overdensities in and around the ZOA. In particular, the Vela supercluster emerges as a dominant mass concentration, rivaling the Shapley concentration and exceeding the mass associated with Laniakea and the Great Attractor region. With a total mass of 33.8 10^16 Msol, a characteristic radius of 70 hmpc, and a double core morphology at a distance of 189 hmpc, Vela dominates the mass budget and gravitational influence of the southern Zone of Avoidance. These results provide the most complete and dynamically consistent picture to date of the southern Zone of Avoidance and demonstrate the transformative potential of hybrid reconstruction techniques tailored for the next generation of large-scale surveys.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过结合CF4++星表的速度距离数据和银河系平面附近的新红移观测，改进了对银河系遮蔽区域大尺度结构的重建，发现Vela超星系团是南部遮蔽区的主要质量集中区。
AI.motivation: 银河系平面附近的尘埃和恒星遮蔽了约20%的河外天空，导致大尺度结构观测存在严重不完整性，限制了宇宙流动观测与潜在质量密度场之间关系的明确解释。
AI.method: 开发了混合重建方法，结合CF4++星表的65,518个星系速度距离数据与南部银河平面遮蔽区（|b|≤10度）的8,283个新红移观测，其中包含2,176个SARAO MeerKAT望远镜获得的高灵敏度干涉HI红移数据。
AI.result: Vela超星系团成为主导质量集中区，总质量33.8×10^16太阳质量，特征半径70h^-1 Mpc，距离189h^-1 Mpc，具有双核心形态，其质量超过Laniakea和Great Attractor区域，与Shapley集中区相当。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提供了迄今为止最完整、动力学一致的南部银河平面遮蔽区图像，展示了为下一代大尺度巡天定制的混合重建技术的变革潜力。

title: Mass regulates the emerging timescale of young star clusters
comment: 4 main figures; 2 extended data figures; 1 extended data table; accepted for publication
summary: Quantifying the timescales of star cluster emergence from their natal clouds remains one of the main challenges in our understanding of the star formation process. These timescales are fundamental measurements of the star formation cycle within galaxies, yet they are difficult to constrain due to the complex interplay between stellar feedback and star formation across a vast range of physical scales. Here we present HST and JWST observations of thousands of young star clusters in four nearby galaxies (M51, M83, NGC 628, and NGC 4449). A substantial fraction of these clusters are still embedded within their natal gas and remain invisible at optical wavelengths. We constrain their emergence process by measuring the timescales required to disperse the surrounding material. We find a strong correlation between dispersal timescale and cluster stellar mass, with massive clusters emerging more rapidly than their lower mass counterparts. This is a critical constraint on simulations of star formation and stellar feedback, which struggle to fully reproduce the formation and emergence of star clusters. Our results emphasize the central role of massive clusters in driving the escape of ionizing radiation into the galactic medium. Finally, they impose important limitations to the time available for planet formation in massive cluster environments where disks get exposed to UV irradiation and further gas infall is shut off.

AI.tldr: 利用HST和JWST观测四个邻近星系中的年轻星团，发现大量星团仍被气体包裹，光学不可见。研究发现星团质量越大，从气体中"浮现"所需时间越短，这对恒星形成模拟和行星形成时间有重要影响。
AI.motivation: 量化星团从其诞生云中浮现的时间尺度是理解恒星形成过程的主要挑战之一。这些时间尺度是星系内恒星形成周期的基本测量参数，但由于恒星反馈与恒星形成在广泛物理尺度上的复杂相互作用，这些时间尺度难以确定。
AI.method: 使用哈勃太空望远镜(HST)和詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜(JWST)观测四个邻近星系(M51、M83、NGC 628和NGC 4449)中的数千个年轻星团。通过测量分散周围物质所需的时间尺度来约束星团的浮现过程。
AI.result: 发现大量星团仍被其诞生气体包裹，在光学波长下不可见。星团质量与分散时间尺度之间存在强相关性：质量越大的星团浮现速度越快。这对恒星形成和恒星反馈的模拟提出了关键约束，这些模拟难以完全再现星团的形成和浮现过程。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果强调了大质量星团在驱动电离辐射逃逸到星系介质中的核心作用。同时，这些结果对行星形成时间施加了重要限制，特别是在大质量星团环境中，盘状结构暴露于紫外辐射，进一步的气体吸积被关闭。

recommendation.reason: 与 Zotero 兴趣画像中的 jwst 等主题/作者匹配。
